history.title: Dionysus or Bacchus: God of Revelry and Wine
history.description: "Dionysus or Bacchus: God of Revelry and Wine Dionysus was the Greek god of wine, agriculture, and the theater. He was also the protector of vines, and trees. He was mainly associated with the intoxicating effects of wine. His Roman names are Bacchus and Liber. His followers were known as Bacchants,
